claim: No Stable, release, conformance, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.naming: A visible Field label, native label, aria-label, or aria-labelledby names the textarea.
semantics.roleOverride: Consumer role overrides are outside the supported contract.
semantics.refTarget: documented in anatomy and API records

interaction.keyboard: The browser owns multiline editing, composition, selection, undo, paste, and validation.
interaction.pointer: Native pointer activation and cancellation remain authoritative for interactive descendants.
interaction.touch: Coarse-pointer presentation preserves at least a 44 CSS pixel preferred target where the item is interactive.
interaction.speech: Visible labels remain available for voice targeting.
interaction.switchAccess: No duplicate proxy focus target is introduced.

formBehavior: Native name, value, maxlength, required, disabled, and reset semantics remain authoritative. maxGraphemes uses non-destructive native custom validity, synchronizes visual and ARIA invalid state after committed input, and clears validity after correction or reset.

states.synchronization: Visible, programmatic, and native form states are kept synchronized without hidden behavior engines.

preferences.enhancedContrast: Uses semantic theme tokens and non-color state cues.
preferences.forcedColors: Uses system colors, visible borders, and system-color focus indicators.
preferences.reducedMotion: No essential information depends on motion; Switch removes its thumb transition.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Labels and messages wrap without clipping; form values retain native scrolling where applicable.

internationalization.imePolicy: Native editing and maxLength retain browser composition behavior. maxGraphemes freezes count and validity during composition, then evaluates the committed value without truncation.
internationalization.serialization: Serialized names and values remain consumer-owned machine data and are never localized by the component.

consumerResponsibilities: Override provider count keys or formatCount when English fallbacks are unsuitable.
Provide Intl.Segmenter or a standards-conformant polyfill when using maxGraphemes in an unsupported legacy runtime.
Do not add JavaScript truncation or submission transforms that corrupt composition.
limitations: Source-present-unreleased records do not include immutable generated artifacts, packed-consumer evidence, package/source parity, or current manual assistive-technology sessions.
